# C2 kernel innovation screening exploration, June 2026

Generated by `mix run test/fixtures/rtk/generators/rover_c2_innovation_screening_2026_06.exs`.
Per-run JSON was emitted to `/tmp/c2-kernel-screening-2026-06-results.json`.

This is a single-sided exploration artifact. It ports per-epoch innovation screening into the Rust RTK filter kernel on branch `explore/c2-kernel-screen`.

## Setup

- Inputs match C1: phone RINEX from `/tmp/gsdc-work`, P222 CORS base observations, and BKG combined broadcast NAV.
- Detector segmentation is ON via the C1 detector-injected rover ambiguity ids.
- Runtime boundary: this report uses every built epoch in each arc.
- The measured path uses the Rust sequential filter (`filter_kernel: :rust`) with `innovation_screen_sigma` in 5.000, 8.000, 10.000, 15.000, 25.000 and `innovation_screen_min_rows: 8`.
- The screen rejects individual code/phase DD rows whose absolute normalized predicted residual is greater than k before the measurement update; if fewer than 8 rows survive, the epoch coasts on the prediction.

|---:|---:|---|---|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---|---|
| 5.000 | 4/4 | 1314/3136/1465/1610 | 9.896/10.134/10.774/10.906 | 47.544/44.718/158.273/52.722 | 10.312/56.622 | 214/2.792% | 51.150% | 12.000/14/26 | no | no |

| 15.000 | 4/4 | 1314/3136/1465/1610 | 10.191/10.326/10.464/11.189 | 56.568/49.897/100.988/58.755 | 10.488/57.677 | 56/0.731% | 50.101% | 11.000/13/24 | no | no |
| 25.000 | 4/4 | 1314/3136/1465/1610 | 10.191/10.328/10.464/11.180 | 56.568/49.929/100.988/54.063 | 10.488/57.079 | 54/0.705% | 50.040% | 11.000/13/23 | no | no |

Median and p95 columns are reported only for arcs that solved every built epoch. Pooled values combine the completed arcs for that k.

## Verdict

Verdict: no. Best k=5.000 produced pooled median 10.312 m versus the 9.5 m one-epoch bar and demo5 pooled median 4.007 m.

## Convergence

Best k=5.000 time series are emitted in `best_k_error_series` in the JSON. Convergence below the one-epoch baseline after the transient: no. Final-100 pooled median/p95 is 10.331/33.985 m versus measured one-epoch pooled median 9.533 m; 0/4 arcs have final-100 median at or below their own one-epoch median.

| Arc | Epochs | One-epoch median m | First <= one-epoch | Below one-epoch % | Final-100 med/p95 m | Min/last m |
|---|---:|---:|---|---:|---:|---:|
| SJC1-08-04 | 1453 | 9.117 | 36 @ 2021-08-04T20:41:19.449 | 45.079% | 10.388/41.670 | 0.937/20.851 |
| SVL1-08-24 | 3136 | 9.516 | 4 @ 2021-08-24T20:33:04.437 | 46.269% | 11.402/31.841 | 0.422/6.230 |
| MTV1-12-15 | 1465 | 9.417 | 31 @ 2021-12-15T18:49:42.438 | 43.072% | 10.032/32.846 | 0.284/8.471 |
| MTV1-12-28 | 1610 | 9.965 | 29 @ 2021-12-28T20:17:54.438 | 45.155% | 10.212/23.343 | 0.613/8.976 |

## Costs

| k | Coasted epochs | Coasting % | Rejected row % | Rejected rows/epoch med/p95/max |
|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| 5.000 | 214 | 2.792 | 51.150 | 12.000/14/26 |
| 8.000 | 79 | 1.031 | 50.313 | 11.000/13/24 |
| 10.000 | 68 | 0.887 | 50.196 | 11.000/13/24 |
| 15.000 | 56 | 0.731 | 50.101 | 11.000/13/24 |
| 25.000 | 54 | 0.705 | 50.040 | 11.000/13/23 |

Rows rejected per epoch is pooled across all solved epochs for each k. Coasting fraction is coasted epochs divided by solved epochs. Rejected row % is rejected rows divided by input screen rows.

## C2b soft robust weighting + Hatch smoothing

Generated by `mix run test/fixtures/rtk/generators/rover_c2_innovation_screening_2026_06.exs --c2b`.
Per-run JSON was emitted to `/tmp/c2b-soft-weighting-2026-06-results.json`.

### Setup

- Inputs match C2: phone RINEX from `/tmp/gsdc-work`, P222 CORS base observations, and BKG combined broadcast NAV.
- Detector segmentation is ON via the C1 detector-injected rover ambiguity ids.
- Runtime boundary: this report uses every built epoch in each arc.
- `code_smoothing: true` is accepted by `solve_filter_baseline_epochs`; the shared prep applies Hatch smoothing before Rust epoch terms are built, so it reaches the Rust filter path.
- Soft weighting uses `innovation_screen_mode: :huber_weight`: rows are retained and each row receives information factor `min(1, k / abs(normalized_innovation))`; epochs still coast when summed factors fall below 8.

### Cells

| Cell | k | Mode | Hatch | Complete arcs | Arc medians m SJC1/SVL1/MTV15/MTV28 | Arc p95 m SJC1/SVL1/MTV15/MTV28 | Pooled med/p95 m | Final-100 med/p95 m | Coasted epochs/% | Retained info | Rejected/downweighted rows | <=9.53m | <=demo5 4.007m |
|---|---:|---|---|---:|---|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---|---|
| Hard k=5 reference | 5.000 | reject | no | 4/4 | 9.896/10.134/10.774/10.906 | 47.544/44.718/158.273/52.722 | 10.312/56.622 | 10.331/33.985 | 214/2.792% | 48.850% | 51.150% rejected | no | no |
| Hard k=5 + Hatch | 5.000 | reject | yes | 4/4 | 63.290/90.948/247.345/284.869 | 829.466/665.814/1529.968/1447.489 | 133.429/1196.726 | 76.206/346.576 | 6400/83.507% | 13.118% | 86.882% rejected | no | no |
| Hatch only |  | none | yes | 4/4 | 1662270.899/3193171.479/3460673.762/2668824.084 | 5716289.886/18300539.179/8126474.159/6210082.176 | 2625161.739/8894184.367 | 3889456.665/10951333.029 | 0/0.000% | 100.000% | 0.000% | no | no |
| Huber soft k=3.000 | 3.000 | huber_weight | no | 4/4 | 268.005/269.586/510.425/371.298 | 827.702/1169.578/1595.210/1354.869 | 337.256/1300.349 | 390.243/971.968 | 5506/71.842% | 25.983% | 83.459% downweighted | no | no |
| Huber soft k=5.000 | 5.000 | huber_weight | no | 4/4 | 342.512/358.339/618.064/487.025 | 955.133/1607.199/1654.638/1384.799 | 440.910/1432.111 | 479.170/797.856 | 5033/65.671% | 29.913% | 79.927% downweighted | no | no |
| Huber soft k=8.000 | 8.000 | huber_weight | no | 4/4 | 221.804/492.095/703.812/628.337 | 1245.503/2530.569/1696.269/1428.634 | 527.934/1719.967 | 729.467/4001.197 | 4428/57.777% | 33.474% | 76.008% downweighted | no | no |

Full-arc median and p95 columns are reported only for arcs that solved every built epoch. Retained info is summed applied factors divided by unweighted input rows; no-screen rows report 100%.

### Attribution

Hard k=5 reference: Hard k=5 reference pooled 10.312/56.622 m, final-100 10.331/33.985 m, retained 48.850%. Adding Hatch to hard k=5: median delta +123.117 m and final-100 delta +65.875 m versus hard k=5. Hatch alone: Hatch only pooled 2625161.739/8894184.367 m, final-100 3889456.665/10951333.029 m, retained 100.000%. Best soft weighting: Huber soft k=3.000 pooled 337.256/1300.349 m, final-100 390.243/971.968 m, retained 25.983%; median delta +326.945 m and final-100 delta +379.913 m versus hard k=5.

### Verdict

Best row: Hard k=5 reference, pooled median 10.312 m and final-100 median 10.331 m. Clears the 9.533 m memoryless bar: no. Clears demo5 4.007 m: no.
